chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1160 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on CMA 6887/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 13-03-2024 Mr. Shehzado Dreho, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zafar Ali Eidan Mangi, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** By consent, this petition is disposed of in the terms, whereby respondents would give Rs.500,000/- to the petitioner which includes cost of the petition in addition to Rs.600,000/- already decided by the Labour Tribunal in impugned judgment dated 16.05.2023 in favour of petitioner. With this calculation, full and final settlement would be Rs.11,00,000/-. It is stated that Rs.600,000/- have already been paid by the respondents which the petitioner has received. Hence, respondents shall deposit Rs.500,000/-, as stated above, with the Accountant of this Court, who shall hand over the same to the petitioner after due verification, identification and as per rules. For his pension, if any, the petitioner would be at liberty to approach the proper forum i.e. EOBI department. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
